article_meta.title: Ukraine expected to give up land, some arms under US peace plan, sources sayBy Tom Balmforth and Anastasiia MalenkoNovem

reasoning: Systematic failures: flagged attributed/quoted language as author bias, majority of items are non-genuine bias, all bias type labels are off-list/misapplied, and output used code fences (structurally invalid). Caught one real instance but mislabeled.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged Rubio’s attributed statement as bias, violating the attribution rule; other items were author prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items were neutral reporting or standard sourcing practices, not genuine author-level bias.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed only minor potential spin (e.g., ‘grinding forwards’); did catch the main subjective framing (‘major setback’).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-listed categories (e.g., Framing, False Balance, Passive Voice) and misapplied labels across items.
